name: Trello
shortDescription: Comprehensive project management and team collaboration platform for automating board, card, and task management workflows.

actions.name: Get Board by ID
actions.description: Requests a single board.

actions.name: Find Board by Name
actions.description: Finds a board by name.

actions.name: Find or Create Board
actions.description: Finds a board by name, or creates it if it doesn't exist.

actions.name: Create Board
actions.description: Creates a new board.

actions.name: Get Board Lists
actions.description: Get the lists on a board.

actions.name: Create Board List
actions.description: Creates a new list on a board.

actions.name: Find Board List by Name
actions.description: Finds a list on a board by name.

actions.name: Find or Create Board List
actions.description: Finds a list on a board by name, or creates it if it doesn't exist.

actions.name: Get Board Members
actions.description: Gets the members for a board.

actions.name: Get Board Actions
actions.description: Gets all the actions of a board.

actions.name: Get Enabled Power-Ups on Board
actions.description: Gets the enabled power-ups on a board.

actions.name: Get Board Labels
actions.description: Gets all the labels on a board.

actions.name: Create Board Label
actions.description: Creates a new label on a board.

actions.name: Update Board Label
actions.description: Updates a label on a board.

actions.name: Delete Board Label
actions.description: Deletes a label from a board.

actions.name: Find Board Label by Name
actions.description: Finds a label on a board by name.

actions.name: Find or Create Board Label
actions.description: Finds a label on a board by name, or creates it if it doesn't exist.

actions.name: Copy Board
actions.description: Copies an existing board.

actions.name: Close Board
actions.description: Closes a board.

actions.name: Create Card
actions.description: Creates a new card.

actions.name: Update Card
actions.description: Updates a card.

actions.name: Archive Card
actions.description: Archives a card.

actions.name: Unarchive Card
actions.description: Unarchives a card.

actions.name: Delete Card
actions.description: Deletes a card.

actions.name: Get Card by ID
actions.description: Gets a card by its ID.

actions.name: Find Card by Name
actions.description: Finds a card by name.

actions.name: Find or Create Card
actions.description: Finds a card by name, or creates it if it doesn't exist.

actions.name: Get Card Actions
actions.description: Gets a list of actions on a card.

actions.name: Get Card Checklists
actions.description: Gets the checklists on a card.

actions.name: Get Card Checklist by ID
actions.description: Gets information about a single checklist.

actions.name: Add Checklist to Card
actions.description: Creates a new checklist on a card.

actions.name: Delete Card Checklist
actions.description: Deletes a checklist from a card.

actions.name: Get Card Stickers
actions.description: Gets the stickers on a card.

actions.name: Add Sticker to Card
actions.description: Add a sticker to a card.

actions.name: Delete Sticker from Card
actions.description: Deletes a sticker from a card.

actions.name: Get Card Members
actions.description: Gets the members on a card.

actions.name: Add Member to Card
actions.description: Adds a member to a card.

actions.name: Delete Member from Card
actions.description: Deletes a member from a card.

actions.name: Add Label to Card
actions.description: Adds a label to a card.

actions.name: Delete Label from Card
actions.description: Deletes a label from a card.

actions.name: Get Card Attachments
actions.description: Gets a list of attachments on a card.

actions.name: Add Attachment to Card
actions.description: Adds a new attachment to a card.

actions.name: Delete Attachment from Card
actions.description: Deletes an attachment.

actions.name: Add Comment to Card
actions.description: Adds a new comment to a card.

actions.name: Move Card to List
actions.description: Moves a card to a new list.

actions.name: Get List by ID
actions.description: Gets information about a list.

actions.name: Get List Cards
actions.description: Gets a list of cards in a list.

actions.name: Update List
actions.description: Updates the properties of a list.

actions.name: Archive List
actions.description: Archives a list.

actions.name: Get Member by ID
actions.description: Gets a member by its ID.

actions.name: Find Member by Name
actions.description: Finds a member by name.

actions.name: Add Member to Board
actions.description: Adds a member to the board.

actions.name: Delete Member from Board
actions.description: Deletes member from a board.

actions.name: Get Member's Cards
actions.description: Gets the cards a member is on.

actions.name: Get Member's Notifications
actions.description: Gets a member's notifications.

actions.name: Mark Notification as Read
actions.description: Marks a notification as read.

actions.name: Create Checklist
actions.description: Creates a new checklist on a card.

actions.name: Find Checklist by Name
actions.description: Finds a checklist by name on a card.

actions.name: Find or Create Checklist
actions.description: Finds a checklist by name, or creates it if it doesn't exist.

actions.name: Add Checklist Item
actions.description: Creates a new check item on a checklist.

actions.name: Update Checklist Item
actions.description: Updates an item in a checklist on a card.

actions.name: Mark Checklist Item as Complete
actions.description: Marks a checklist item as complete on a card.

actions.name: Find Checklist Item by Name
actions.description: Finds a check item on a checklist by name.

actions.name: Delete Checklist Item
actions.description: Deletes a checklist item.

actions.name: Get Organization by ID
actions.description: Gets an organization by its ID.

actions.name: Get Organization Boards
actions.description: Gets a list of the boards in a Workspace.

idealUseCases: Project management and task tracking automation
